title: Sculk Eye
description: Adds a new Sculk Eye Block - scans entities of a given type in a given radius and emits redstone signal based on the count
body:
This mod adds a new block: Sculk Block

It can scan a given radius (max 100) for a certain entity and emit redstone signal based on the amount of those entities found.

Available modes: 
- Player
- Any mob (not player)
- Friendly
- Hostile
- Custom
